# Validation

| Purpose | Command |
|---|---|
| test | `npm test` |
| build | `npm run build` |
| lint | `npm run lint` |
| typecheck | `npm run typecheck` |
| dev | `npm run dev` |
| deploy | `npm run deploy` |
| debug | `not detected` |
| migrate | `npm run migrate` |
| seed | `npm run seed` |
| docs | `npm run docs` |
| audit | `npm run audit` |
| doctor | `npm run doctor` |

If a command is not detected, inspect the project before claiming validation passed.
